subject: pull policy images from docker hub
commit_message:
pull policy images from docker hub

Docker images of policy project were migrated to the docker
hub. Thus OOM charts were modified to pull them from docker.io
repository instead of nexus3.onap.org.

Note: docker repository was changed only for policy images.
Generic images (i.e. mariadb and nexus) are still pulled via
nexus3.onap.org proxy to be consistent with other ONAP projects.
Their repositories will be changed later together with other
ONAP helm charts referring to them.

Change-Id: If5c384b3d37d0acd21c536c1877a0ffa22655408
Issue-ID: POLICY-1997
Signed-off-by: Martin Klozik <martin.klozik@tieto.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 13 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Build Started https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2783/

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2783/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2783

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

There are dependent patches which must be merged first, e.g. jenkins jobs which will push images built by CI to docker hub directly.
Thus I'm giving this patch -1 to ensure the proper order of merges.

There are dependent patches which must be merged first, e.g. jenkins jobs which will push images built by CI to docker hub directly. See https://jira.onap.org/browse/POLICY-1997 for details.

Thus I'm giving this patch -1 to ensure the proper order of merges.
Removed reviewer Dmitry Puzikov.
